bug_fields.bug_title: REST-API Cleanup Failed: 401 Unauthorized Due to Expired Token
VolumeManager Timing Race Condition Causes Mount Timeout
bug_fields.error_message: AssertionError: volume VOLUDGZVGT9 mount state expected MOUNTED, got MOUNTING. Wait timeout: 45s exceeded
bug_fields.symptoms: Test failures in failover_test and regression_sanity due to mount state timeout

bug_fields.bug_title: SnapEngine ENOSPC Error: Space Accounting Mismatch
bug_fields.error_message: ENOSPC: Space accounting mismatch between available blocks and metadata reserved
bug_fields.symptoms: Snapshot creation failed with ENOSPC, preventing storage allocation despite available space

reason: Identical ENOSPC error in SnapEngine's space accounting causing snapshot failures despite available space, with matching component and root cause description.
workaround_steps: Run pool reclamation task manually: powerstore pool reclaim --id {pool_id} --force

bug_fields.bug_title: AutoSupport Upload Fails Due to TLS Handshake Incompatibility
bug_fields.error_message: SSL_ERROR_HANDSHAKE_FAILURE: Incompatible TLS versions (TLS 1.0 vs. required TLS 1.2+)
bug_fields.symptoms: AutoSupport upload fails with SSL_ERROR_HANDSHAKE_FAILURE indicating server requires TLS 1.2+

bug_fields.bug_title: Version Conflict Between Requests and RequestsLibrary Causes ImportError
bug_fields.error_message: ImportError: cannot import name 'Session' from 'requests' (version 2.26.0). RequestsLibrary requires requests>=2.29.0. Conflict in requirements.txt
bug_fields.symptoms: NVMe_Performance test suite failed to execute, resulting in pipeline termination
